slides.subtitle: Google Visibility
slides.titleHtml:
Be visible when clients search
and turn demand into qualified inquiries

seo.title: Google Visibility & Ads
seo.description: We improve how your business appears in Google and run campaigns focused on qualified inquiries.

about.subtitle: What we solve
about.title: Make your business easier to find and easier to trust

whatWeDo.subtitle: How we work
whatWeDo.title: Diagnosis, execution and continuous refinement
whatWeDo.text: We define short- and mid-term priorities to improve visibility and convert search demand into opportunities.

pricingSection.subtitle: Plans
pricingSection.title: Options to increase visibility and capture active demand
pricingSection.description: A practical mix of organic visibility improvements and campaign execution.

plans.name: Initial Visibility
plans.description: Ideal to start showing up on Google with essential on-site improvements.
features: Clear titles and descriptions for Google

plans.name: Visibility + Ads
plans.description: Combine SEO improvements with Google Ads for visible results in a short time.

plans.name: Growth Plan
plans.description: For companies looking to scale with advanced strategies, automation and constant testing.
features: A/B testing for ads and pages

items.q: When should we expect visibility improvements?
items.a: Timelines depend on your starting point. Early signals usually appear within the first months, with stronger consolidation over time.

items.q: How do you define ad budget?
items.a: We define it based on goals, market demand and expected cost per qualified inquiry.
We prioritize qualified inquiries, cost per opportunity and visibility progress in relevant searches.

workWithUs.subtitle: Work with us
workWithUs.title: Want stronger visibility and more qualified inquiries?
